message:
Improve alerting service and add NTM alerting tests

- Enhance alerts.ts service
- Add ntm-alerting-rules test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-34tk","title":"Deterministic agent naming + mapping for NTM sessions","description":"Goal:\n- Ensure deterministic, user-friendly mapping between Gateway agent IDs and NTM session/pane names.\n\nScope:\n- Define naming scheme; avoid collisions; include repo/task context.\n- Document mapping for operators and logs.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Agents can be traced end-to-end across gateway + NTM.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:44.728282121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T10:31:05.420184024Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T10:31:05.420137466Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ntm","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34tk","depends_on_id":"bd-1khz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:46:08.509946711Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-34tk","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:44.759928338Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-34tk","depends_on_id":"bd-2ov8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:46:10.572008225Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-35cf","title":"Add br client to flywheel-clients","description":"Goal:
- Add br client wrapper (CRUD + ready/list/show/close/update/sync).

Scope:
- Prefer --json output, handle auto-import behavior, map errors.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-3gja + bd-9v6g (parsing + runner).
- E2E: bd-mipc (stub harness).
- Schema drift: bd-20sm (JSON snapshot).

Definition of Done:
- br client exposes typed API used by gateway services.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:46.179500408Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T07:49:17.251823895Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T07:49:17.251308504Z","close_reason":"Implemented br client wrapper in flywheel-clients","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["br","clients"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-35cf","depends_on_id":"bd-1d1j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:37.873523713Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-35cf","depends_on_id":"bd-2p50","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:46.198858636Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-35cf","depends_on_id":"bd-pfkx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:29.767910674Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-39ee","title":"Tests: NTM alerting rules (health, stuck, termination)","description":"Goal:
- Validate NTM alerting rules and metadata for health, stuck, and termination signals.

Scope:
- Simulate degraded health, is-working false, and termination causes.
- Verify alert payloads and structured logs include reason and source.

Definition of Done:
- Unit tests pass with diagnostic logs for alert triggers.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:12:43.937546064Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T01:25:54.456702558Z","closed_at":"2026-01-22T01:25:54.456626245Z","close_reason":"Completed: Added comprehensive unit tests for NTM alerting rules (health degraded, agent stalled, agent termination, rate limited, context low)","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alerts","ntm","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-39ee","depends_on_id":"bd-1ngj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:15:55.837051240Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-39ee","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:16:20.135452645Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-39ee","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:12:44.062166941Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-39ee","depends_on_id":"bd-3t9v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:16:08.026964917Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
